embeds.title: 禁忌卡牌構築手遊《忘卻前夜 Morimens》正式上線！歡迎入學，守密人。喚醒禁忌存在，對抗未知災厄。
embeds.description: 這個世界正在死去。 而你或許是唯一的轉機。 連結與災厄同源的人形武器，來抵抗這場隱密而浩大的危機。 挑戰Roguelite關卡，收集克系美學角色，禁忌卡牌構築手遊《忘卻前夜 Morimens》正式上線！ 歡迎入學，守密人。

Hello! Which Designated Realm should i pick when summoning in Realm Study?
Most of the characters are useful/capable, ~~so you can just be simp~~
But.. which are the most useful?
all are useful, just different playstyles

Yellow is able to be used with any faction and are the most versatile, full yellow teams are usually more defensive in nature

Blue is about buffing tentacles and using the buffed tentacles for better skills as well, most defensive of the 4 factions

Red are full on offense, with lower hp comes better benefits

Purple is about building up a burst of damage by using their extra turn every 5 turns
